query: SELECT work_order_number, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT deferral_category) as categories, COUNT(DISTINCT deferral_category) as cat_count FROM deferral_work_orders GROUP BY work_order_number HAVING cat_count > 1 LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LTmfYgwcE1mg9cB.root --database Jdx475rzuNGCt88odzGLDy --execute SELECT work_order_number, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT deferral_category) as categories, COUNT(DISTINCT deferral_category) as cat_count FROM deferral_work_orders GROUP BY work_order_number HAVING cat_count > 1 LIMIT 20;
